ANTONIA MINOR (MOTHER OF CLAUDIUS). AE Dupondius, Rome Mint, A.D. 41-42. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 3/5.
To view all items from the Connecticut Collection, click  here.
RIC-92. Struck under Claudius. Obverse: Draped bust right; Reverse: Claudius, veiled and togate, standing left and hold simpulum.

From the Connecticut Collection. 

Ex: Classical Numismatic Group 37 (3/1996) Lot # 1439.

Estimate: 150 - 300...
